chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-6431 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.28689/2024 2.For hearing of CMA No.28690/2024 3.For hearing of main case. 20.01.2025 Mr.Umair Bachani, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, Advocate for Respondent (F.B.R) Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Learned counsel for the Respondent (F.B.R) submits that Order-in- Original has been passed and the petitioner has also filed an appeal. It is further stated that the petitioner is at liberty to seek provisional release under Section 195-B of the Customs Act, 1969. Under such circumstances, learned counsel for the petitioner states that he will avail appropriate remedy. Petition is disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge nasir`
